title: Blobbin
description:
Blobbin is a cozy 2D idle clicker about poking blobs, earning Goo, and building a bouncing blob empire.

Start with a simple blob and a single poke. Each click earns Goo, which can be spent on upgrades that make your pokes stronger, increase your crits, boost blob bounces, and unlock new ways to grow. As you progress, your screen fills with colorful blobs, each helping your Goo production in their own squishy way.

Unlock different blob types, combine upgrades, and watch your numbers climb higher and higher as your blob collection gets bigger, bouncier, and more chaotic.

Prestige when you are ready to reset your progress in exchange for Blob Essence, a powerful currency used to unlock permanent rewards. These upgrades make each new run faster, stronger, and gooier than the last.

Later on, experiment with Blob Alchemy to discover new blob species and expand your collection even further.

Features• Poke blobs to earn Goo

• Buy upgrades that improve clicking, crits, bouncing, and passive income

• Unlock new blob types with different roles

• Fill the screen with cute, bouncing blob chaos

• Prestige for Blob Essence and permanent rewards

• Discover new blob species through Blob Alchemy

• Enjoy relaxed idle progression with satisfying upgrades and big numbers

Whether you want to actively poke blobs or sit back and let your blob army do the work, Blobbin is a simple, satisfying idle game full of squishy charm.
description_short: Blobbin is a cozy 2D idle clicker where you poke, bounce, upgrade, and evolve adorable blobs to earn mountains of Goo. Unlock new blob types, prestige for powerful bonuses, and experiment with Blob Alchemy as your squishy little blob empire grows.
